description: Text-only graphic on a plain white background in a heavy black sans-serif font. The large bold headline reads 'Workforce Pell grants aim to support shorter-term jobs training and boost lower-income workers'. Beneath it in smaller bold type is the subheadline: 'The One Big Beautiful Bill Act includes a provision to fund short-term jobs training for low-income students'. There are no photographs, people, agency seals, or logos in this crop.
notable_text: Workforce Pell grants aim to support shorter-term jobs training and boost lower-income workers; The One Big Beautiful Bill Act includes a provision to fund short-term jobs training for low-income students
